user.title: DJI Power Station
user.description:
Enter your DJI Home x-member-token.

See [{help_url}]({help_url}) for instructions on how to obtain it.

device.title: Select Device
device.description: Multiple DJI Power Stations found. Please select one.

reauth.title: Re-authenticate DJI Power Station
reauth.description: Your DJI token has expired. Please re-enter your x-member-token.
